---
title: "A Comparative Analysis of Drug-Induced Hepatotoxicity in Clinically Relevant Situations"
date: 2017-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Computational Biology
  - Systems Biology
  - Toxicology
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Thiel C, Cordes H, <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Aschmann HE, Baier V, Smit I, Atkinson F, Blank LM, Kuepfer L. "A Comparative Analysis of Drug-Induced Hepatotoxicity in Clinically Relevant Situations." <em>PLOS Computational Biology</em> 13 (2017): e1005280, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005280"><code>10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005280</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Final version
      url: https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005280
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005280
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005280
---

## Abstract

Available at the [journal website](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005280).

## Important links

- [Published version](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005280)

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@article{thiel2017comparative,
  title={A Comparative Analysis of Drug-Induced Hepatotoxicity in Clinically Relevant Situations},
  author={Thiel, Christoph and Cordes, Henrik and Fabbri, Lorenzo and Aschmann, H{\'e}l{\`e}ne Eloise and Baier, Vanessa and Smit, Ines and Atkinson, Francis and Blank, Lars Mathias and Kuepfer, Lars},
  journal={PLOS Computational Biology},
  volume={13},
  pages={e1005280},
  year={2017},
  publisher={Public Library of Science (PLoS)}
}
```
